description_long: This object is a round, golden-yellow apple with a slightly flattened top and bottom. Its skin is covered in numerous small, white lenticels, giving it a speckled appearance. The surface is matte with a subtle sheen, and the coloration is consistent across all sides, ranging from pale yellow to light brown. The apple appears firm and unblemished, with no visible bruises or cuts. The stem area is shallow and not prominently indented. There are no stickers, labels, or other markings present on the surface.
description: A round, golden-yellow apple with white speckles and a matte finish. The skin is smooth and unblemished.
description_view_0: Top view showing a slightly flattened surface with dense white speckles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the apple's roundness and even speckling.
description_view_2: Another side view with a more pronounced golden hue and visible speckles.
description_view_3: Side view with a subtle indentation at the top and consistent speckling.
